heading: Tonight
text: Clouds sticking around north, greater clearing south becoming mostly clear and chilly. Lows in the 30s, falling to 25 to 30 in the cold spots, with scattered to widespread frost. Winds northwest near 10 mph, diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Tuesday
text: Mostly sunny and continued cool. Highs in the low to mid 50s north, 50s to near 60 in the Champlain Valley and south. Winds becoming northwest near 10 mph from the Green Mountains east, lighter to the west.
